query:
-- Fix ctr: calculate from clicks/impressions
UPDATE campaign_metrics
SET ctr = CASE 
  WHEN impressions > 0 THEN ROUND((clicks::numeric / impressions::numeric) * 100, 4)
  ELSE 0
END
WHERE ctr = 0 OR ctr IS NULL;

-- Fix roas: calculate from conversions (assume avg order value $45)
UPDATE campaign_metrics
SET roas = CASE 
  WHEN spend > 0 AND conversions > 0 THEN ROUND((conversions * 45.0) / spend, 2)
  ELSE 0
END
WHERE roas = 0 OR roas IS NULL;

-- Verify fix
SELECT campaign_id, date, impressions, clicks, spend, conversions, ctr, roas
FROM campaign_metrics
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 5;
